case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. NASER B. SALEH et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SALEH, NASER B. DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC SERVED SEP-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SALEH, NASER B.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SALEH, NASER B.
DECLARATION ERICA L. BRACHFELD FILED RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALEH, NASER B. $4,373.46 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,609.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY BRACHFELD, ERICA L
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WALSH, MARK D SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
